records.longPhilosophyTextNotes: Detailed explanation of red light therapy science (wavelengths, ATP production) which adds length without aiding quick booking decisions
records.conversionScoreNotes: Prices are listed clearly but most 1:1 booking links say 'available soon'. Red light class info is good but no schedule embed. Page mixes treatments with group classes making it harder to navigate for drop-in visitors.
records.seoScoreNotes: Specific treatment names like 'Clinical Hypnotherapy Berlin' and 'Red Light Therapy Berlin' could rank well. H1 is descriptive. However no address, no LocalBusiness schema confirmed, and city name only appears in image alt text and practitioner context.
